name: been-sober-for
description: A simple site where users can register, upload a photo, and input the date of their last drink. Then share it with people. On their account profile page, they can click start again, if they have a drink.
shortDescription: A simple site where users can register, upload a photo, and input the date of their last drink. Then share it with people. On their account profile page, they can click start again, if they have a drink.
